MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PRESENT; PLTF NANCY KAPOGIANNIS, JOSEPH SACRAMENTO, PLTF'S ATTNY, GREGORY BART, DECT, JOSH BORGER, DEFTS ATTNY. SETTLEMENT SET FORTH ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO HAVE RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES, EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS, DEFT TO VACATE BY 9-30-05 BY 5pm. IF VACATED, DISM WILL BE FILED. IF NOT VACATED, EXPARTE APP FOR JUDGMENT OF POSSESSION. NO STAY OF EXECUTION, NO OTHER ADULTS LIVING AT ADDRESS, PLTF NOT OBLIGATED TO STORE POSSESSIONS, PROPERTY TO BE LEFT BROOM CLEAN. PLTF RETAINS SECURITY DEPOSIT.
R. MICHAEL LIEBERMAN, JUDGE PRO TEM
J. BRYCE, CSR
G. PEERLESS, CLK
